name: New Element
desc: Creates a new element. Supports nested children to build full element trees in one operation. Each child follows the same structure (Element, Name, Path, Value, Values, Children). Use Children to define hierarchical UI structures.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.display: Element value, it is the element path without the .tpl portion

parameters.name: Children
parameters.helpText: Array of child elements. Each child can include Element, Name, Path, Value, Values, and its own Children. Used to create nested UI structures in one call.
